feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Custom fields flow from Sale order to Purchase Requisition and Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

I have created few custom fields in Sale order item level, and i wanted those to flow to Purchase requisition and Purchase order in SAP S4HANA Public Edition.

I checked in Business Scenarios Tab while creating custom fields but unable to find PR and PO to enable.

It would be grateful if you could help me.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Search SAP tables via ODBC connection with power BI
entry.content:
Good morning,
Using the coordinates of the user CUST_USER_ROLE_ADMIN, it is not possible for me to target the location of the SAP tables when connecting to Power BI via ODBC.

I would appreciate it if you could provide me with support or a document to use to properly comprehend and establish a reading of SAP data via Power BI using an ODBC connection or the SAP hana connector of power BI desktop?
Thanks in advance

entry.title: SAP MDG: Full Forms of column names in Mapping Sheet
entry.content:
Hi SCN People, 

Hope you guys are doing well 🙂

I recently downloaded the Sheet form S Note, I checked in Legend sheet but not found, some of the column names not able to guess in below screenshot (CMP, GOV & MOP).


Thanks, 

Suggu Sandeep.

SAP Master Data Governance

entry.title: Sales Intercompany with WBS Element - VF156 error
entry.content:
Greetings,

I have an intercompany service sales scenario, that is, a plant in the group sells a service to the customer, but it will be another plant in the group that will provide the service.

I believe that the problem is in the accounting of the WBS element that is assigned to the plant. As the sales order VA01 is assigned to a sales organization/company, but the item was assigned to the plant that will provide the service, when trying to invoice the sales order I get the error:

Spoiler
VF156 No WBS billing element found while substituting WBS element 00000200.

The SAP Note 672929 already described in other topics left me with more questions than answers. What should be done?
Should the SAP PS consultant configure it so that when it is an Intercompany process, the cost accounting does not happen in the WBS element, but in a higher structure?

Thanks in advance 🙂

entry.title: test
entry.content: test

entry.title: Integrate SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud to SAP Signavio Process Insights
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We want to connect our SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud systems (RISE subscription) to SAP Signavio Process Insights but currently we don't have active SAP BTP subscription , Could you please let us know if we can integrate in any other way possible ?

Thanks in Adavance

Subasri

entry.title: Cannot understand Credit limit Overdue check
entry.content:
Hi expert

I create Sale Order but get error: Oldest open item is 219 days overdue

I check BP and see Oldest Item amount =0, Days= 219.

FBL5N have no open invoice, customer has large advance amount.

This error after we performed an upgrade from ECC to S/4HANA. 

Are there anythings I miss understand. pls help. thank you very much.

entry.title: S/4 HANA Public Cloud: Event-Based Costing - Costing Sheet and Activity Types
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community, 

 

Is it possible on SAP S/4 HANA Cloud to exclude the use of Activity Type for Labor Costs in production costing?

This is with the idea of using Costing Sheets fully for all production costs both in actual and standard costing for Labor and Overhead costs. 

How can we apply? 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Can you provide suggestions for migrating data from SAP R/3 (4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (public)?
entry.content:
Hi ,
Aside from the staging table approach, can data migration be achieved using standard iFlows in SAP Cloud Platform Integration, or would we need to create custom iFlows or custom programs for this purpose?

Are there any other methods or third-party tools that can be used?

entry.title: Need to set screen variant as per user id on Tcode FB60
entry.content: Need to set screen variant as per user id on Tcode FB60

entry.title: How to define correct FI organizational structure to suitable for customer's require?
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

I studied a lot about FI organizational structure and integration structure, but I am very confused about how to define correct FI organization, is suitable for a customer's business. I still can not understand clearly about the concepts of organizational structure of SAP.
Let me give you a case study:
My customer has 3 branches in the same country. They want a company code for the parent company, the subsidiaries will be profit centers. They asked us to come up with solutions and analyze advantages and disadvantage? I feel very helpless in this case.

Through this case, Can you explain the criteria to define an organizational structure. What are the important implications and recommendations when building an organizational structure?

------ I am a junior, I'm thankful to everyone for reading my post. Have a good day. -------

#SAP S/4HANA Finance FIN (Finance) #SAP FI #Organization structure

entry.title: connection between sap btp and a s/4 hana cloud private system
entry.content:
Hello to everyone,
I have been reading this course: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/extending-sap-s-4hana-with-sap-build-apps-and-key-user-extensibility/establishing-connectivity-between-sap-s-4hana-cloud-and-sap-btp_f3d6df41-c36c-450b-8ae8-79534e043fa1 . 

and many doubts arose.
The first one is: Do I have to have the Communication Systems application implemented, in order to make the connection between BTP and my S/4 HANA system?
the second doubt is: Can it be that to connect BTP with S/4 HANA Cloud Private and S/4 HANA on-premise I have to use Cloud Connector, but for S/4 HANA Cloud Public I don't have to use it?

Help please, I am lost with this.
Thanks and greetings to all,

entry.title: Is it possible to Planned Order Qty Splitting Automatically when run MRP for MTO Orders ?
entry.content:
When we run the MRP with MTO Process , need to do order qty splitting with FX-Fix lot size procedure to manage the production capacity requirement ,if anyone have working with above scenario please advice. 

 

 

Thanks

LP

entry.title: Capacity checking control at sales order and Sales Quotation Level
entry.content:
I want to know check with expert in SAP, what kind of solution we can use for the checking Capacity at Sales order level , if there no enough capacity sales order should be blocked.

 

 

 

Thanks

 

LP

entry.title: Is it possible in S/4 HANA on-premise set-up a 2-system landscape? Advantages and disadvantages?
entry.content:
My doubt arises because theoretically, managing two systems could simplify operations. In the clients I have worked with, there has always been a 3-system landscape, and I wonder why it remains the default configuration currently.

Thank you very much

entry.title: SAP MDG: HANA Search making default for both Customer & Supplier
entry.content:
Hi SCN Folks, 

performing HANA Search for both Customer and Supplier,

Will the Customising Mode be the same on both? Why? Because initially I kept the Customising Configuration for the customer working properly, and then I went to the supplier to configure it, receiving the result that it was defaulted in the supplier but lost in the customer.

Thanks, 

Suggu Sandeep.

SAP Master Data Governance SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA business partner

entry.title: Store data about approver and approved object after flexible workflow approval
entry.content:
I have a requirement from our compliance people to log (store) data after approval of purchase requisitions and purchase orders. This will be used to check among other things which documents a person approved if it turns out that person was incorrectly assigned as approver.

Well, that should be easy I said, we just hook on to the change document when the document status changes to approved (define event for change document - transaction SWEC). Famous last words....
That is not quite how it works with flexible workflow where the change of the document being approved (whether it is a purchase requisition or a purchase order) is done by the workflow runtime user SAP_WFRT.

There is in fact no information in the purchase requisition's change documents about who approved the requisition. Creating an event based on the change document is not a solution (or rather, not a very useful solution) and we may as well hang on to the standard event such as CL_MM_PUR_WF_OBJECT_PO event PurchaseOrderApproved.

It looks like I will have to identify the relevant workflow log and read data from the container(s) there. Not exactly what I had hoped for, but I will just have to give it a go .... UNLESS someone here wants to share their idea about an alternative solution approach. SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re-triggering Approval Flow Only on Price Increase for PO/Requisition
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We have a situation for both Purchase Orders (POs) and Purchase Requisitions (PRs) in our SAP MM module. Currently, when a change is made after a PO/PR has already been released, it re-triggers the approval flow regardless of the nature of the change.

We need to configure the system so that the approval flow is re-triggered only if the total PO/PR price has increased after the release.

Has anyone encountered a similar requirement and can provide guidance on how to achieve this?

Instead of using the traditional release procedure configuration, we are looking to leverage the Flexible Workflow. Specifically, we need:

  1. Guidance on setting up Flexible Workflow to re-trigger the approval process only when the total PO/PR price increases.
  2. Steps to configure conditions within the flexible workflow to handle this scenario.
  3. Any necessary BAdI implementations or enhancements to support this requirement.

Any detailed instructions, examples, or references to documentation would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your assistance!

Best regards,
VIJAY RAWAL (SAP MM)

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud, extended edition SAP Community  SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sourcing and Procurement MM Purchasing #Release Strategy #BAdI (Business Add-Ins) #Release Strategy #Approval Process #Flexible Workflow

entry.title: eDocument Saudi Arabia - simplified invoice
entry.content:
Invoice Type code issue - how to fill up each position as per ZATCA?

entry.title: Convert field from path expression to dimension in analytical CDS view
entry.content:
Hello

I am using standard CDS view ‘C_ConsolidationMatrixRpt10Q’ for reporting. However, I need 'FinancialStatementItemType' as dimension in this SAC story to use it for conditional formatting. Story is on live model.

‘FinancialStatementItemType’ is available as an property of 'FSITEM' , however I cannot use  property of dimension as filters while defining conditional formatting in SAC story 

In custom CDS view based on 'C_ConsolidationMatrixRpt10Q' I was able to add 'FinancialStatementItemType' from association ‘_FinStmntItm’. However this field is not available as dimension in story.

Is there a way to make a field from association available in SAC story as dimension  ?

 

-Thanks

Sandhya
